hero.title: Khulega Online
hero.subtitle: Your privacy matters. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your information.

intro.heading: 1. Introduction
intro.para1: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, process, and protect your information when you access:
intro.notice: By using Khulega Online, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Who We Are
sections.intro: Khulega Online is a SaaS-enabled platform that helps sellers integrate and manage multiple marketplaces from a centralized dashboard (USC).
roleItems: A data processor for marketplace integrations
A service provider for optional seller support services
sections.highlight: We are not a marketplace and do not directly sell products to customers.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.intro: We collect information in the following categories:

subsections.intro: When you register or contact us, we may collect:

subsections.intro: When using the Unified Seller Console (usc.khulega.online), we may collect:

subsections.title: Marketplace Integration Data
subsections.intro: When you connect marketplaces such as:
subsections.highlight: This data is processed strictly for platform functionality.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.alertDanger: We do not sell your personal or business data.

sections.title: Legal Basis for Processing
sections.intro: We process your data based on:

sections.title: Data Sharing & Disclosure

subsections.title: Legal Authorities
subsections.intro: If required by law, court order, or government request.

sections.alertDanger: We do not sell or rent your data to advertisers.

sections.title: Data Storage & Security
sections.intro: We implement reasonable technical and organizational safeguards, including:
sections.alert: However, no system can guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: Data Retention
list: For as long as your account remains active
As required for legal or regulatory compliance
sections.highlight: Upon account termination, we may delete or anonymize data, except where legally required to retain it.

sections.title: Cookies & Tracking Technologies
sections.alert: You may disable cookies in your browser settings, but certain features may not function properly.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.intro: Depending on applicable laws, you may have the right to:

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.intro: Our website or USC dashboard may contain links to third-party websites.
list: We are not responsible for the privacy practices of external platforms.
You are advised to review their privacy policies separately.

sections.title: Children's Privacy
sections.intro: Khulega Online is intended for business users.
sections.alertDanger: We do not knowingly collect data from individuals under 18 years of age.

sections.title: International Data Transfers
sections.intro: If data is stored or processed outside India:
list: We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place

sections.title: Updates to This Privacy Policy
sections.intro: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Updated versions will be posted on khulega.online.
sections.highlight: Continued use of the platform indicates acceptance of revised policies.

consent.title: Consent
consent.text: By using khulega.online and the Unified Seller Console (usc.khulega.online), you consent to:
list: The collection of information as described in this Privacy Policy
The use of information as described in this Privacy Policy
The processing and storage practices outlined herein
